title: UNU
description: Want some more basic but neat Nether content? Well I got some for you! Welcome to the Unofficial Nether Update.
body:
Ever wanted a little bit more nether content? Nothing crazy just some extra grinds? Well I got you covered! Welcome to UNU: Unofficial Nether Update!

 

I made this mod about 2 years ago and just left it, however I have remade it from the ground up and added more items! I am open to any and all suggestions!

 
**Current items:**

- Firebrand
- Battle Axe
- Spectral Scythe
- Magma Chunk
- Ember Wand
- Magma Set (Armor, Tools etc)
- Magma Ingot
- Ectoplasm
  

**Things I'd like to add in the future:**

- A boss or two
- More creatures & enemies
- More equipment (armor, tools etc)
- Fire Aura Enchant
